attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
 WNADC.BK_AR_ADJ_NUMBER           
 ,WNADC.BK_COMPANY_CODE              
 ,WNADC.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY 
 ,NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
 ,WNADC.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE
 ,WNADC.HEADER_CONTEXT
 ,'O'  SOURCE_TYPE
 , WNAGL.LINE_ID
 ,'N'  METRIX_FLAG
 ,'N' SALES_CREDIT_FLAG
 FROM
 $$STGDB.WI_NCR_AR_DATA_CUR_CG WNADC
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
 ON WNADC.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
 INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_AR_GET_LINES_CG WNAGL
 ON NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = WNAGL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
 AND WNADC.BK_AR_ADJ_NUMBER         = WNAGL.BK_AR_ADJ_NUMBER     
 AND WNADC.BK_COMPANY_CODE               = WNAGL.BK_COMPANY_CODE
 AND WNADC.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY           = WNAGL.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
 WHERE
 WNADC.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN ('INV','CM','DM')
 AND 
 (EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM  $$STGDB.WI_REV_SCA_NRT_SNAP  X
     WHERE X.EP_SOURCE_LINE_ID_INT =  WNAGL.LINE_ID 
     AND X.SS_CD = NATL.SS_CODE
     AND X.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD = 'O' 
     /* AND END_TV_DTM = '3500-01-01 00:00:00'  */
                 AND X.SS_CD= WNADC.SS_CODE )
  OR EXISTS
  (SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_SO_GLOBAL_NAME EL_GNAME, $$STGDB.WI_REV_SCA_NRT_SNAP  Y
  WHERE Y.EP_SOURCE_LINE_ID_INT =  WNAGL.LINE_ID AND Y.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD = 'O' 
  AND EL_GNAME.ORG_ID = WNADC.ORG_ID
  AND EL_GNAME.ACTIVE_IND = 'Y'  
  AND EL_GNAME.ORIG_SS_CD = Y.SS_CD)
  )
 AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_NCR_AR_SLS_CRE_FLG_CG Y 
                                      WHERE WNADC.BK_AR_ADJ_NUMBER = Y.BK_AR_ADJ_NUMBER 
                                      AND WNADC.BK_COMPANY_CODE = Y.BK_COMPANY_CODE 
                                      AND WNADC.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = Y.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
                                      AND WNADC.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = Y.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  )
 UNION ALL
 SELECT
 WNADC.BK_AR_ADJ_NUMBER           
 ,WNADC.BK_COMPANY_CODE              
 ,WNADC.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY 
 ,NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
 ,WNADC.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE
 ,WNADC.HEADER_CONTEXT
 ,'O'  SOURCE_TYPE
 , WNAGL.LINE_ID
 ,'N'  METRIX_FLAG
 ,'Y' SALES_CREDIT_FLAG
 FROM
 $$STGDB.WI_NCR_AR_DATA_CUR_CG WNADC
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
 ON WNADC.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
 INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_AR_GET_LINES_CG WNAGL
 ON NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = WNAGL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
 AND WNADC.BK_AR_ADJ_NUMBER         = WNAGL.BK_AR_ADJ_NUMBER     
 AND WNADC.BK_COMPANY_CODE               = WNAGL.BK_COMPANY_CODE
 AND WNADC.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY           = WNAGL.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
 WHERE
 WNADC.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN ('INV','CM','DM')
 AND COALESCE(WNAGL.LINE_ID,-1) > 0
 AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM  $$STGDB.WI_REV_SCA_NRT_SNAP  X
     WHERE X.EP_SOURCE_LINE_ID_INT =  WNAGL.LINE_ID 
     AND X.SS_CD = NATL.SS_CODE
     AND X.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD = 'O' 
     /* AND END_TV_DTM = '3500-01-01 00:00:00'  */
                 AND X.SS_CD= WNADC.SS_CODE )
  AND NOT EXISTS
   (SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_SO_GLOBAL_NAME EL_GNAME, $$STGDB.WI_REV_SCA_NRT_SNAP  Y
  WHERE Y.EP_SOURCE_LINE_ID_INT =  WNAGL.LINE_ID AND Y.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD = 'O' 
  AND EL_GNAME.ORG_ID = WNADC.ORG_ID
  AND EL_GNAME.ACTIVE_IND = 'Y'  
  AND EL_GNAME.ORIG_SS_CD = Y.SS_CD)
 AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_NCR_AR_SLS_CRE_FLG_CG Y 
                                      WHERE WNADC.BK_AR_ADJ_NUMBER = Y.BK_AR_ADJ_NUMBER 
                                      AND WNADC.BK_COMPANY_CODE = Y.BK_COMPANY_CODE 
                                      AND WNADC.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = Y.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
                                      AND WNADC.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = Y.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  )

SELECT
WNADE.BK_AR_ADJ_NUMBER              
,WNADE.BK_COMPANY_CODE               
,WNADE.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY 
,EOUGC.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE   
,NAT.BK_AR_TRX_NUMBER
,NAT.AR_TRX_DATETIME               
,WNADE.AR_TYPE_CD              
,COALESCE(WNADE.AR_ADJ_TRX_REASON_CODE,NAATY.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_NAME) AS REASON_CODE
,SUM(COALESCE(WNADE.AR_ADJ_TRX_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT,0)) AS AR_ADJ_TRX_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT  
,SUM(COALESCE(WNADE.AR_ADJ_TRX_FUNCTIONAL_AMT,0)) AS AR_ADJ_TRX_FUNCTIONAL_AMT
,COALESCE(WNADE.GL_DATE,DATE)   AS GL_DATE
,WNADE.GL_POSTED_DATE
,WNADE.AR_TRX_KEY
,WNADE.RU_BK_ADJD_AR_TRX_KEY
,WNADE.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY
/*,NAT.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE         
,NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE*/
,WNADE.TRXL_CURR_CODE AS BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE
,WNADE.FUNC_CURRENCY_CODE AS FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE,
/*START: Added as part of CF-LSS Q3FY15  */
/*,NAT.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY  AS SHIP_TO_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY,*/
 CASE WHEN NATL.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY > 0  THEN NATL.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
            ELSE NAT.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
            END as SHIP_TO_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY,
/*END: Added as part of CF-LSS Q3FY15  */
 NAT.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY AS BILL_TO_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY
,NAT.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
,NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE        
,NATT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE           
/*,NGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE     */
,WNADE.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE
,NULL AS HEADER_CONTEXT
,WNADE.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
,WNADE.BK_ADJD_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
,CAST(CASE WHEN NATIL.AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE_CR_DR_TYPE   = 'CREDIT' THEN NATIL.RU_CREDIT_EXTENDED_AMOUNT ELSE NATIL.RU_DEBIT_EXTENDED_AMOUNT  END AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS EXTENDED_AMOUNT
,WNADE.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_TYPE
,NATIL.PRODUCT_KEY
,WNADE.SS_CODE
, NULL AS RMA_FLAG
,WNADE.SK_ADJUSTMENT_ID_INT
,WNADE.FISCAL_ID
,EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT AS ORG_ID
,NAT.MANUAL_TRANSACTION_FLG AS MANUAL_TRANSACTION_FLG
,WNADE.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
,SUM(COALESCE(WNADE.ACCTD_AMOUNT,0)) AS ACCTD_AMOUNT
,SUM(COALESCE(WNADE.AMOUNT,0)) AS AMOUNT
,WNADE.ACCOUNT_CLASS
,WNADE.SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT
FROM
$$STGDB.WI_NCR_AR_DATA_EXP_CG WNADE
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
	ON WNADE.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
	ON WNADE.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY

/*START: Added as part of CF-LSS Q3FY15  */
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
 ON (NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=WNADE.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY) 
/*END: Added as part of CF-LSS Q3FY15  */

	
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY  EOUGC
	ON NAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE= EOUGC.BK_COMPANY_CODE              
	AND NAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY    = EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY       
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE NAATY
	ON (WNADE.BK_AR_ADJ_TYPE_CODE = NAATY.BK_AR_ADJ_TYPE_CODE
	/* AND NAATY.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE    rchettri:  SS_CD join incorrect */ 
	AND NAATY.BK_COMPANY_CODE = EOUGC.BK_COMPANY_CODE
	AND NAATY.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY )
/*INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT NGLA
	ON WNADE.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY = NGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY*/
/* Commented by Amit as this table is not used anywhere */
/*INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB
	ON NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = WNADE.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY*/
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NATT
	ON NATT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = NAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE
	AND NATT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
	AND NATT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = NAT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL
	ON NATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = WNADE.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_ACCOUNTING_RULE NAAR
	ON NAAR.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME = NATIL.RU_BK_RULE_ACCOUNT_RULE_NAME
WHERE
WNADE.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_TYPE   = 'LINE'
GROUP BY 
WNADE.BK_AR_ADJ_NUMBER              
,WNADE.BK_COMPANY_CODE               
,WNADE.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY 
,EOUGC.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE   
,NAT.BK_AR_TRX_NUMBER
,NAT.AR_TRX_DATETIME               
,WNADE.AR_TYPE_CD              
,COALESCE(WNADE.AR_ADJ_TRX_REASON_CODE,NAATY.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_NAME)
,COALESCE(WNADE.GL_DATE,DATE)
,WNADE.GL_POSTED_DATE
,WNADE.AR_TRX_KEY
,WNADE.RU_BK_ADJD_AR_TRX_KEY
,WNADE.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY
,WNADE.TRXL_CURR_CODE
,WNADE.FUNC_CURRENCY_CODE,
/*START: Added as part of CF-LSS Q3FY15  */
/*NAT.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,*/
 CASE WHEN NATL.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY > 0  THEN NATL.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY ELSE NAT.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY END, 
/*END: Added as part of CF-LSS Q3FY15  */
 NAT.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
,NAT.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
,NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE        
,NATT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE           
,WNADE.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE
,WNADE.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
,WNADE.BK_ADJD_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
,WNADE.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_TYPE
,NATIL.PRODUCT_KEY
,WNADE.SS_CODE
,WNADE.SK_ADJUSTMENT_ID_INT
,WNADE.FISCAL_ID
,EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT
,NAT.MANUAL_TRANSACTION_FLG
,WNADE.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
,WNADE.ACCOUNT_CLASS
,WNADE.SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT
,CAST(CASE WHEN NATIL.AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE_CR_DR_TYPE   = 'CREDIT' THEN NATIL.RU_CREDIT_EXTENDED_AMOUNT ELSE NATIL.RU_DEBIT_EXTENDED_AMOUNT  END AS DECIMAL(18,6))

SELECT
 NAAT.BK_AR_ADJ_NUMBER              
 ,NAAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE               
 ,NAAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY           
 /*,NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY AS BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY*/
 ,NAAT.AR_ADJ_TRX_REASON_CODE        
 /*,NAAT.GL_DATE                       
 ,NAAT.GL_POSTED_DATE                */
 ,EXALA.ACCOUNTING_DATE AS  GL_DATE
 ,EXAHA.GL_TRANSFER_DATE AS GL_POSTED_DATE
 ,NAAT.ADJUSTMENT_SOURCE_TYPE_CODE   
 ,NAAT.TRANSACTION_DATETIME          
 ,NAAT.AR_ADJ_TRX_FUNCTIONAL_AMT     
 ,NAAT.AR_ADJ_TRX_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT  
 ,NAAT.BK_AR_ADJ_TYPE_CODE           
 ,NAAT.AR_TRX_KEY                    
 ,NAAT.SK_ADJUSTMENT_ID_INT          
 ,NAAT.SS_SOURCE_APPLICATION_CODE    
 ,NAAT.SS_CODE                       
 /*,NAAT.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY */
 ,ENGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY   
 ,NAAT.AR_ADJ_TRX_ITEM_USD_AMT       
 ,NAAT.AR_ADJ_TRX_ITEM_TRXL_AMT      
 ,NAAT.AR_ADJ_TRX_FREIGHT_USD_AMT    
 ,NAAT.AR_ADJ_TRX_FREIGHT_TRXL_AMT   
 ,NAAT.AR_ADJ_TRX_TAX_USD_AMT        
 ,NAAT.AR_ADJ_TRX_TAX_TRXN_AMT       
 ,NAAT.AR_TYPE_CD                    
 ,NAAT.AR_ADJ_TRX_USD_AMT            
 ,NAAT.AR_ADJUSTMENT_STATUS_CD       
 ,NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
 ,NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME
 ,NAT.RU_BK_ADJD_AR_TRX_KEY         
 ,NATL.BK_ADJD_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY       
 ,NATL.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_TYPE
 ,NAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT
 ,NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
 ,CASE WHEN NATIL.AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE_CR_DR_TYPE   = 'CREDIT' THEN NATIL.RU_CREDIT_EXTENDED_AMOUNT                    ELSE NATIL.RU_DEBIT_EXTENDED_AMOUNT  END LINE_EXT_AMOUNT
 ,CASE WHEN NATTL.TAX_LINE_CR_DR_TYPE           = 'CREDIT' THEN NATTL.RU_TAX_CREDIT_AMOUNT           ELSE NATTL.RU_TAX_DEBIT_AMOUNT       END TAX_EXT_AMOUNT
 ,CASE WHEN NATFL.FREIGHT_LINE_CR_DR_TYPE       = 'CREDIT' THEN NATFL.RU_FREIGHT_CREDIT_AMOUNT       ELSE NATFL.RU_FREIGHT_DEBIT_AMOUNT   END FREIGHT_EXT_AMOUNT
 ,EAMPD.FISCAL_ID
 /*ADDED THE FOLLOWING COLUMNS IN CURSOR*/
 ,EXALA.CURRENCY_CODE AS TRXL_CURR_CODE
 ,NSOB.CURRENCY_CODE AS FUNC_CURRENCY_CODE
 /*,CASE WHEN NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN ('DM','INV') THEN EXALA.ACCOUNTED_DR ELSE EXALA.ACCOUNTED_CR END       AS ACCTD_AMOUNT
 ,CASE WHEN NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN ('DM','INV') THEN EXALA.ENTERED_DR ELSE EXALA.ENTERED_CR END                 AS AMOUNT */
 /*,(COALESCE(EXDLA.UNROUNDED_ACCOUNTED_CR,0) - COALESCE(EXDLA.UNROUNDED_ACCOUNTED_DR,0)) ACCTD_AMOUNT
 ,(COALESCE(EXDLA.UNROUNDED_ENTERED_CR,0) - COALESCE(EXDLA.UNROUNDED_ENTERED_DR,0) ) AS AMOUNT */
 /* amkumar2: Q4FY14 release */
 ,(COALESCE(EXALA.ACCOUNTED_CR,0) - COALESCE(EXALA.ACCOUNTED_DR,0)) ACCTD_AMOUNT
 ,(COALESCE(EXALA.ENTERED_CR,0) - COALESCE(EXALA.ENTERED_DR,0) ) AS AMOUNT 
 ,'REV' AS ACCOUNT_CLASS
 ,ENGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE
 ,ENGLA.CODE_COMBINATION_ID AS SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT
 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_MONTH_PROCESS_DATE EAMPD,
 $$ETLVWDB.EL_XLA_AE_LINES_AR EXALA
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
  ON NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = EXALA.GLOBAL_NAME
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XLA_AE_HEADERS_AR EXAHA
     ON EXAHA.AE_HEADER_ID = EXALA.AE_HEADER_ID
     AND EXAHA.APPLICATION_ID = EXALA.APPLICATION_ID
     AND EXAHA.GLOBAL_NAME = EXALA.GLOBAL_NAME
     AND EXAHA.BALANCE_TYPE_CODE = 'A'
  AND EXAHA.APPLICATION_ID = 222
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XLA_EVENTS_AR EXEA
  ON EXEA.EVENT_ID = EXAHA.EVENT_ID
  AND EXEA.APPLICATION_ID = EXAHA.APPLICATION_ID
  AND EXEA.GLOBAL_NAME = EXAHA.GLOBAL_NAME
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XLA_TRANSACTION_ENTITIES_AR EXTEA
  ON EXTEA.ENTITY_ID = EXEA.ENTITY_ID
  AND EXTEA.GLOBAL_NAME = EXEA.GLOBAL_NAME
  AND EXTEA.APPLICATION_ID = EXEA.APPLICATION_ID
  AND EXTEA.ENTITY_CODE = 'ADJUSTMENTS'
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_ADJUSTMENT_TRX NAAT
  ON EXTEA.SOURCE_ID_INT_1 = NAAT.SK_ADJUSTMENT_ID_INT
  AND NAAT.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
 /* Added as part of design change */    
/* INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT  ENGLA 
      ON (ENGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY = NAAT.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY) */    /* COMMENTED AS PART OF CDC Q4FY18 */
	  
/*  added as part of CDC Q4FY18--START */    
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT COALESCE(EV_NGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,-995) AS GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,ELCDC.CODE_COMBINATION_ID ,ELCDC.GLOBAL_NAME,ELCDC.SEGMENT4 AS BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE
    FROM
    $$ETLVWDB.EL_CDC_GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS ELCDC
    INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
    ON ELCDC.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
    LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT EV_NGLA
    ON    (        
             ELCDC.SEGMENT1=EV_NGLA.BK_COMPANY_CODE
    AND ELCDC.SEGMENT2=EV_NGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CODE
    AND ELCDC.SEGMENT3=EV_NGLA.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE
    AND ELCDC.SEGMENT4=EV_NGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE
    AND ELCDC.SEGMENT5=EV_NGLA.BK_SUBACCOUNT_CODE
    AND ELCDC.SEGMENT6=EV_NGLA.BK_PROJECT_CODE
    ) QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY  ELCDC.SEGMENT1,  ELCDC.SEGMENT2,  ELCDC.SEGMENT3,  ELCDC.SEGMENT4,
ELCDC.SEGMENT5, ELCDC.SEGMENT6 ORDER BY  GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY DESC)=1
  )ENGLA  
       ON (ENGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY = NAAT.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY) 
/*  CDC-end*/       

	  
 /* INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL EADL
           ON (EADL.SOURCE_ID = NAAT.SK_ADJUSTMENT_ID_INT                   
           AND EADL.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME  
           AND EADL.SOURCE_TABLE  = 'ADJ' 
     AND EADL.SOURCE_TYPE  = 'ADJ' 
     AND EADL.CODE_COMBINATION_ID = ENGLA.CODE_COMBINATION_ID
    AND EADL.GLOBAL_NAME = ENGLA.GLOBAL_NAME)    
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XLA_DISTRIBUTION_LINKS_AR EXDLA
                 ON EADL.LINE_ID = EXDLA.SOURCE_DISTRIBUTION_ID_NUM_1  
                 AND EXDLA.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
                 AND EXDLA.SOURCE_DISTRIBUTION_TYPE = 'AR_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL'
                 AND EXDLA.APPLICATION_ID = 222                                                
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XLA_TRANSACTION_ENTITIES_AR EXTEA
   ON EXTEA.SOURCE_ID_INT_1 = NAAT.SK_ADJUSTMENT_ID_INT
   AND EXTEA.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
   AND EXTEA.APPLICATION_ID = 222
   AND EXTEA.ENTITY_CODE = 'ADJUSTMENTS'
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XLA_EVENTS_AR EXEA
   ON EXEA.ENTITY_ID = EXTEA.ENTITY_ID
   AND EXEA.APPLICATION_ID = EXTEA.APPLICATION_ID
   AND EXEA.GLOBAL_NAME = EXTEA.GLOBAL_NAME
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XLA_AE_HEADERS_AR EXAHA
                 ON EXAHA.EVENT_ID = EXEA.EVENT_ID
                 AND EXAHA.APPLICATION_ID = EXEA.APPLICATION_ID
                 AND EXAHA.GLOBAL_NAME = EXEA.GLOBAL_NAME
                 AND EXAHA.BALANCE_TYPE_CODE = 'A'
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XLA_AE_LINES_AR EXALA
                 ON EXALA.AE_HEADER_ID = EXAHA.AE_HEADER_ID
                 AND EXALA.APPLICATION_ID = EXAHA.APPLICATION_ID
                 AND EXALA.GLOBAL_NAME = EXAHA.GLOBAL_NAME
     AND EXALA.ACCOUNTING_CLASS_CODE = 'ADJ'*/
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_ADJUSTMENT_TRX SMADJ   
                 ON NAAT.SK_ADJUSTMENT_ID_INT = SMADJ.SK_ADJUSTMENT_ID_INT
                 AND NAAT.SS_CODE = SMADJ.SS_CD
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
                 ON NAAT.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE NABS
                 ON NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY = NABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY 
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
                 ON NAT.AR_TRX_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_KEY
 /*INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB
                 ON NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY */
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CDC_GL_SETS_OF_BOOKS NSOB
 				ON NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID = EXAHA.LEDGER_ID
                 AND NSOB.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME      
                           
 /*INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT  ENGLA 
      ON (ENGLA.CODE_COMBINATION_ID = EXALA.CODE_COMBINATION_ID
      AND ENGLA.GLOBAL_NAME = EXALA.GLOBAL_NAME ) */
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL
                 ON NATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_FREIGHT_LINE NATFL
                 ON NATFL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TAX_LINE NATTL
                 ON NATTL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
 WHERE 1=1
 /*AND NAAT.GL_DATE BETWEEN EAMPD.START_DATE AND EAMPD.END_DATE */
 AND EXALA.ACCOUNTING_DATE  BETWEEN EAMPD.START_DATE AND EAMPD.END_DATE
 /*AND NAAT.GL_POSTED_DATE IS NOT NULL */
 AND EXAHA.GL_TRANSFER_DATE IS NOT NULL
 AND COALESCE(EXAHA.GL_TRANSFER_STATUS_CODE, 'N') = 'Y'
 AND NAAT.AR_TYPE_CD IN ('INVOICE','LINE')
 AND NAAT.ADJUSTMENT_SOURCE_TYPE_CODE = 'AR'                         
 AND NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME <> 'CM-GLOBAL REBATE'
 AND COALESCE(NAAT.AR_ADJUSTMENT_STATUS_CD,'A') = 'A'
 AND NAAT.AR_ADJ_TRX_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT <> 0
 AND COALESCE(EXAHA.BALANCE_TYPE_CODE,'X') = 'A'
 AND NAAT.SS_CODE   ='CDC'
 AND EXALA.GLOBAL_NAME ='CDC'

SELECT 
WNADC.AR_TRX_KEY,
SUM(	COALESCE(
					CASE	WHEN	NATIL.AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE_CR_DR_TYPE   = 'CREDIT' THEN NATIL.RU_CREDIT_EXTENDED_AMOUNT 		
							ELSE 	NATIL.RU_DEBIT_EXTENDED_AMOUNT  
					END
				,0)
	) AS LINE_EXT_AMOUNT ,
	
SUM(	COALESCE(
					CASE 	WHEN 	NATTL.TAX_LINE_CR_DR_TYPE           = 'CREDIT' THEN NATTL.RU_TAX_CREDIT_AMOUNT           
							ELSE 	NATTL.RU_TAX_DEBIT_AMOUNT       
					END
				,0) 
		+ 
		COALESCE(
					CASE 	WHEN 	NATFL.FREIGHT_LINE_CR_DR_TYPE       = 'CREDIT' THEN NATFL.RU_FREIGHT_CREDIT_AMOUNT       
							ELSE 	NATFL.RU_FREIGHT_DEBIT_AMOUNT   
					END
				,0)
	) AS TAX_FREIGHT_AMT
FROM  (SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.WI_NCR_AR_DATA_EXP_CG
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY AR_TRX_LINE_KEY ORDER BY AR_TRX_LINE_KEY ) = 1) WNADC
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
	ON WNADC.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY
INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
	ON WNADC.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY	
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL
	ON NATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_FREIGHT_LINE NATFL
	ON NATFL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TAX_LINE NATTL
	ON NATTL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
GROUP BY WNADC.AR_TRX_KEY

SELECT 
  /*'REV' AS ACCOUNT_CLASS,*/
  WNADC.ACCOUNT_CLASS,
  /*ENGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE AS ACCOUNT_CODE,*/
  WNADC.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE AS ACCOUNT_CODE,
  NULL AS ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID,
  NULL AS ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,
  /* CAST(
  CASE WHEN ABS(WNADC.AR_ADJ_TRX_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT) >  ABS(WNAA.TAX_FREIGHT_AMT) AND WNAA.LINE_EXT_AMOUNT <> 0 THEN
   CAST((
   (
   
   (CASE WHEN WNADC.AR_ADJ_TRX_FUNCTIONAL_AMT < 0 THEN -1 ELSE 1 END) *
     (ABS(WNADC.AR_ADJ_TRX_FUNCTIONAL_AMT) - 
     CAST( (ABS(WNAA.TAX_FREIGHT_AMT) * (CASE WHEN WNADC.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE = WNADC.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE THEN 1 ELSE COALESCE(NCCDR.PL_CONVERSION_RATE,1) END)) AS DECIMAL(18,6))
   )
   )
   * WNADC.EXTENDED_AMOUNT
   )   AS DECIMAL(18,6))/ 
   ((CASE WHEN WNADC.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE = WNADC.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE THEN 1 ELSE COALESCE(NCCDR.PL_CONVERSION_RATE,1) END) * WNAA.LINE_EXT_AMOUNT )
  ELSE 0
  END 
  AS DECIMAL(18,6))
  ACCTD_AMOUNT,*/

   CAST((
   (
   
   (CASE WHEN WNADC.ACCTD_AMOUNT < 0 THEN -1 ELSE 1 END) *

     CAST( (ABS(WNAA.TAX_FREIGHT_AMT) * (CASE WHEN WNADC.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE = WNADC.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE THEN 1 ELSE COALESCE(NCCDR.PL_CONVERSION_RATE,1) END)) AS DECIMAL(26,7))
   )
   )
   * WNADC.EXTENDED_AMOUNT
   )   AS DECIMAL(26,7))/ 
   ((CASE WHEN WNADC.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE = WNADC.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE THEN 1 ELSE COALESCE(NCCDR.PL_CONVERSION_RATE,1) END) * WNAA.LINE_EXT_AMOUNT )
  ELSE 0
  END

  WNADC.BK_AR_ADJ_NUMBER AS ADJUSTMENT_NUMBER,

  ELSE 0
  END 
  AS DECIMAL(18,6))

  /*CAST(
  CASE WHEN ABS(WNADC.AMOUNT) >  ABS(WNAA.TAX_FREIGHT_AMT) AND WNAA.LINE_EXT_AMOUNT <> 0 THEN
   CAST((((CASE WHEN WNADC.AMOUNT < 0 THEN -1 ELSE 1 END) * (ABS(WNADC.AMOUNT) - ABS(WNAA.TAX_FREIGHT_AMT))) * WNADC.EXTENDED_AMOUNT) AS DECIMAL(26,7))/ WNAA.LINE_EXT_AMOUNT
  ELSE 0

  CAST(
CASE

    CAST((((CASE WHEN WNADC.AMOUNT < 0 THEN -1 ELSE 1 END) * (ABS(WNADC.AMOUNT) )) * WNADC.EXTENDED_AMOUNT) AS DECIMAL(26,7))/      (WNAA.LINE_EXT_AMOUNT+WNAA.TAX_FREIGHT_AMT)

 WHEN COALESCE(NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT,NSOLV.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT,NSOL_CAL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT) IS NOT NULL THEN COALESCE(NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT,NSOLV.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT,NSOL_CAL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT)

    ELSE EORCTLOL.ORDER_LINE_ID END

 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_SO_GLOBAL_NAME EL_GNAME
 ON EL_GNAME.ORG_ID = WNADC.ORG_ID
 AND EL_GNAME.ACTIVE_IND = 'Y'
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL_CAL
 ON NSOL_CAL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT = EORCTLOL.ORDER_LINE_ID
 AND NSOL_CAL.SS_CODE = EL_GNAME.ORIG_SS_CD        
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO_CAL
 ON NSOL_CAL.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSO_CAL.SALES_ORDER_KEY
 /* END: ADDED AS PART OF AUS MIGRATION */                                 
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
 ON WNADC.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO_AR
 ON NAT.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSO_AR.SALES_ORDER_KEY   
 /*avandras-ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY15*/
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE NABS
 ON NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY=NABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY 
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL  /*Added: TNC Feb 2020 Release*/
 ON WNADC.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
/*^^^^^^^^^^^^^*/

SELECT
WNADC.BK_AR_ADJ_NUMBER           
,WNADC.BK_COMPANY_CODE              
,WNADC.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
,NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
,WNADC.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE
,WNADC.HEADER_CONTEXT
,'I'  SOURCE_TYPE
, NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
,'N'  METRIX_FLAG
,'N' SALES_CREDIT_FLAG
FROM
$$STGDB .WI_NCR_AR_DATA_CUR_CG WNADC
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
ON WNADC.BK_ADJD_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
WHERE
WNADC.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN ('CM','DM')
AND EXISTS (	SELECT 1 FROM  $$STGDB.WI_REV_SCA_NRT_SNAP  X 
				WHERE X.EP_SOURCE_LINE_ID_INT  =  NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT 
				AND X.SS_CD = NATL.SS_CODE
				AND X.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD = 'I' 
			/*	AND CAST(END_TV_DTM AS DATE) = '3500-01-01'    */
			)
AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_NCR_AR_SLS_CRE_FLG_CG Y 
                                     WHERE WNADC.BK_AR_ADJ_NUMBER = Y.BK_AR_ADJ_NUMBER 
                                     AND WNADC.BK_COMPANY_CODE = Y.BK_COMPANY_CODE 
                                     AND WNADC.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = Y.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
                                     AND WNADC.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = Y.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY	 )
